forecasts.detailed: Areas of fog between 11pm and 4am, then areas of fog and a slight chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 41. Southeast wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

Patchy fog between 9pm and 1am, then patchy drizzle and patchy fog between 1am and 5am, then patchy drizzle and patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 44. Southeast wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

Rain showers after midnight. Mostly cloudy. Low around 37, with temperatures rising to around 50 overnight. South wind 14 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 36 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecasts.detailed: Patchy drizzle before 11pm, then areas of fog between 11pm and 5am, then areas of fog and a slight chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 43. East wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

Rain showers likely. Cloudy, with a low around 46. South wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
